{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Orange plasma bolts
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Zenith Cannon]] fires orange plasma bolts.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
